meetings.summary: MECFS history, amyloid plaque theory, and Scorch Protocol preparation.
meetings.notes:

Intervention: Recommended switching from Armor (NDT) to pure T3 for the protocol. Introduced coffee enemas as a superior liver flush mechanism. 

Supplements: Discussed ivermectin, fenbendazole (anti-parasitic), and fluconazole (antifungal) as supplementary therapies during T3 recovery.
nextSteps: Transition from NDT to pure T3 sourcing
Practice coffee enemas before the main fast
Acquire Fenbendazole and Fluconazole for the secondary cleanup phase
Continue fat adaptation (Keto) for 1-2 more weeks

meetings.notes:
History: 30 years sick (chemical exposures + Long Covid). 'Vaccine injury' discussion.

Dietary Paradox: Feels '1000x better' on carbs (energy returns) but lipids/cholesterol worsen. Ketovore/Carnivore causes fatigue return.

Plan: Prioritize raising BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate) over fasting for now. T3 + TUDCA + B1 key.
